summary: The O_EXCL per-card lock closes the original read-then-rename CAS race in the normal case, but the stale-lock breaker can still re-open overlapping critical sections when a live holder runs longer than `LOCK_STALE_MS`.

findings.title: Stale-lock breaking can admit two live workers into the same per-card critical section
findings.recommendation: Do not treat lock age alone as proof of death. Either remove stale breaking entirely, or write owner metadata (pid/host/start time) and only break after verifying the owner is gone; alternatively use a lease/heartbeat scheme and only let the lock holder refresh/remove its own tokenized lock file.
